_comment: Example load configurations for brain-daemon. Copy to load_configs.json and adapt to your models. Keys are model IDs as returned by /mgmt/models (relative to models_path in config.yaml). Use lmstudio-community/<repo>/<filename-without-.gguf> for HuggingFace models, or a custom subfolder name for locally-quantized models.

mercury/my-custom-model-Q6_K._comment: Example for a locally-quantized model stored in <models_path>/mercury/. Replace 'my-custom-model-Q6_K' with your actual filename (without .gguf).
